name: Release Integrity / Handoff Hardening
scope: clean-room archive extraction and integrity verification
PathWalk generated job script portability fix

issues_found.summary: Generated dry-run job scripts embedded a temporary absolute workspace path from the generation machine, including an M60.5.4 path inside M60.6 artifacts.
issues_found.impact: Archived job_scripts were not portable across clean-room extraction unless ORDO_PATHWALK_ROOT was overridden.

issues_found.summary: PathWalk RC README still declared v9.5 / M60.5.4 while archive name was v9.6 / M60.6.
Compact M60.6 baseline artifact archive contained score evidence and job descriptors but not runtime_templates, so it is suitable for recollect/evidence but not full re-execution by itself.
issues_found.impact: Clarified as evidence-only unless runtime_templates are present or a new plan is generated.

fixes_applied.summary: Updated PathWalk dry_run.py job script generator to avoid baked absolute roots.
Generated job scripts now use ORDO_PATHWALK_ROOT and ORDO_CLI_ROOT, with fail-fast errors if ordo_pathwalk/ or cli/ordo/ is missing.
Patched existing packaged job_scripts in workspace/developer bundle examples and reports to the portable contract.
Updated README/CHANGELOG/JOB_EXECUTION/book source notes for M60.6.1.

validation_notes: M60.6 RAW_METRICS and SUMMARY were not recalibrated or weight-adjusted.
A new 1-scenario × 3-runtime-view smoke was executed from patched standalone PathWalk RC plus developer bundle CLI and passed 3/3.
Full 20×3 model/API benchmark was not run; M60.6.1 is release-integrity hardening, not calibration.
next_recommended_step: M60.6.2 calibration report refinement, then M60.7/M61 real-module testcase generation only after acceptance.
